---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What's missing or could be better**
A clear description of the gap (e.g. "the skill doesn't cover `todo.sh listcon`").

**Example prompt that should work**
> "..."

**Proposed behavior**
What the agent should do — which `todo.sh` command/flags it should run.

**Additional context**
Links to the relevant todo.txt CLI docs, examples, etc.
